name: next-analytics-pages
description: Generate analytics pages/components for a Next app from Cube analytics contracts generated in another app, including a local Cube proxy route.

options.description: App name that contains generated analytics contracts (apps/<analytics-app>/src/analytics/contracts).
Single model name to scaffold analytics pages for.
Comma-separated model names to scaffold analytics pages for.
Generate analytics pages for all discovered analytics contracts.
Route base under src/app where analytics pages are generated.
Analytics page layout mode (stacked or split).
Default time-series granularity for generated pages.
Overwrite generated files unless a no-auto-update directive is present.
